attributes.synopsis: A group of pirates lead by Alvida plunder a ship, only to find a barrel which contains a strange boy named Luffy. Luffy is on a mission to find the legendary treasure "One Piece" and he befriends the ship's cabin-boy, Coby, who actually wants to become a marine officer. Luffy defeats Alvida and the two journey on in search of crewmates.
attributes.description: A group of pirates lead by Alvida plunder a ship, only to find a barrel which contains a strange boy named Luffy. Luffy is on a mission to find the legendary treasure "One Piece" and he befriends the ship's cabin-boy, Coby, who actually wants to become a marine officer. Luffy defeats Alvida and the two journey on in search of crewmates.

titles.en_jp: Ore wa Luffy! Kaizoku Ou ni Naru Otoko Da!
titles.en_us: I'm Luffy! The Man Who's Gonna Be King of the Pirates!
titles.ja_jp: 俺はルフィ!海賊王になる男だ!

attributes.canonicalTitle: I'm Luffy! The Man Who's Gonna Be King of the Pirates!

attributes.synopsis: Luffy and Coby arrive at Shell Island, a Marine base. They meet the bounty hunter Roronoa Zoro, held under arrest by the infamous marine, Captain Morgan, and his son Helmeppo.
attributes.description: Luffy and Coby arrive at Shell Island, a Marine base. They meet the bounty hunter Roronoa Zoro, held under arrest by the infamous marine, Captain Morgan, and his son Helmeppo.

titles.en_jp: Daikengou Arawaru! Kaizokugari Roronoa Zoro
titles.en_us: Enter the Great Swordsman! Pirate Hunter Roronoa Zoro!
titles.ja_jp: 大剣豪現る!海賊狩りロロノア·ゾロ

attributes.canonicalTitle: Enter the Great Swordsman! Pirate Hunter Roronoa Zoro!

attributes.synopsis: Luffy convinces Zoro to join his crew, but they must first defeat Captain Morgan. After freeing the island from Morgan's oppressive rule, Coby is accepted as a marine while the other two continue on their journey.
attributes.description: Luffy convinces Zoro to join his crew, but they must first defeat Captain Morgan. After freeing the island from Morgan's oppressive rule, Coby is accepted as a marine while the other two continue on their journey.

titles.en_jp: Morgan vs. Luffy! Nazo no Bishoujo wa Dare?
titles.en_us: Morgan versus Luffy! Who's the Mysterious Pretty Girl?
titles.ja_jp: モーガンVSルフィ!謎の美少女は誰?

attributes.canonicalTitle: Morgan versus Luffy! Who's the Mysterious Pretty Girl?

attributes.synopsis: Out on the sea, Luffy almost loses his hat and reflects on his past, and how a pirate named Shanks influenced him. Afterwards, Luffy meets Nami, and Buggy the Clown's men.
attributes.description: Out on the sea, Luffy almost loses his hat and reflects on his past, and how a pirate named Shanks influenced him. Afterwards, Luffy meets Nami, and Buggy the Clown's men.

titles.en_jp: Luffy no Kako! Akagami no Shanks Toujou
titles.en_us: Luffy's Past! Enter Red-Haired Shanks!
titles.ja_jp: ルフィの過去!赤髪のシャンクス登場

attributes.canonicalTitle: Luffy's Past! Enter Red-Haired Shanks!

attributes.synopsis: In order to save herself and steal a map to the Grand Line, Nami tricks Luffy into allowing her to turn him over to Buggy.
attributes.description: In order to save herself and steal a map to the Grand Line, Nami tricks Luffy into allowing her to turn him over to Buggy.

titles.en_jp: Kyoufu Nazo no Chikara! Kaizoku Douke Buggy-senchou!
titles.en_us: A Terrifying Mysterious Power! Captain Buggy, the Clown Pirate!
titles.ja_jp: 恐怖!謎の力·海賊道化バギー船長!

attributes.canonicalTitle: A Terrifying Mysterious Power! Captain Buggy, the Clown Pirate!

attributes.synopsis: Mohji and Richie show up for revenge after Buggy's humiliating defeat in the previous episode, and Luffy meets a small dog guarding his master's store, even though he knows that he is long dead.
attributes.description: Mohji and Richie show up for revenge after Buggy's humiliating defeat in the previous episode, and Luffy meets a small dog guarding his master's store, even though he knows that he is long dead.

titles.en_jp: Zettai Zetsumei! Moujuutsukai Mohji VS Luffy!
titles.en_us: Desperate Situation! Beast Tamer Mohji vs. Luffy!
titles.ja_jp: 絶体絶命!猛獣使いモージvsルフィ!

attributes.canonicalTitle: Desperate Situation! Beast Tamer Mohji vs. Luffy!

attributes.synopsis: Enraged by the actions of Buggy's crew, the city's mayor rushes to fight Buggy himself, but the Straw Hat Pirates come to his rescue. Zoro fights Cabaji, despite still being wounded from his previous encounter with Buggy, while Luffy faces the clown pirate himself and Nami searches for the map to the Grand Line.
attributes.description: Enraged by the actions of Buggy's crew, the city's mayor rushes to fight Buggy himself, but the Straw Hat Pirates come to his rescue. Zoro fights Cabaji, despite still being wounded from his previous encounter with Buggy, while Luffy faces the clown pirate himself and Nami searches for the map to the Grand Line.

titles.en_jp: Souzetsu Kettou! Kengou Zoro vs Kyokugei no Cabaji!
titles.en_us: Epic Showdown! Swordsman Zoro vs. Acrobat Cabaji!
titles.ja_jp: 壮絶決闘!剣豪ゾロvs曲芸のカバジ!

attributes.canonicalTitle: Epic Showdown! Swordsman Zoro vs. Acrobat Cabaji!

attributes.synopsis: Buggy's link to Shanks is revealed, and when he rips the straw hat Shanks gave Luffy, his rage knows no bounds. Who will win in this clash between Devil Fruit users?
attributes.description: Buggy's link to Shanks is revealed, and when he rips the straw hat Shanks gave Luffy, his rage knows no bounds. Who will win in this clash between Devil Fruit users?

titles.en_jp: Shousha wa Dotchi? Akuma no Mi no Nouryoku Taiketsu!
titles.en_us: Who is the Victor? Devil Fruit Power Showdown!
titles.ja_jp: 勝者はどっち?悪魔の実の能力対決!

attributes.canonicalTitle: Who is the Victor? Devil Fruit Power Showdown!

attributes.synopsis: Luffy, Zoro, and Nami arrive at an island hoping to obtain a ship and crew, but the three are quickly confronted with the blustering Captain Usopp - who has a connection to Luffy's past.
attributes.description: Luffy, Zoro, and Nami arrive at an island hoping to obtain a ship and crew, but the three are quickly confronted with the blustering Captain Usopp - who has a connection to Luffy's past.

titles.en_jp: Seigi no Usotsuki? Captain Usopp
titles.en_us: The Honorable Liar? Captain Usopp!
titles.ja_jp: 正義のうそつき?キャプテンウソップ

attributes.canonicalTitle: The Honorable Liar? Captain Usopp!

attributes.synopsis: Luffy follows Usopp to the mansion and encounters the brutal pirate Captain Kuro. The scoundrel plans to claim Kaya's fortune and live the stolen life of luxury.
attributes.description: Luffy follows Usopp to the mansion and encounters the brutal pirate Captain Kuro. The scoundrel plans to claim Kaya's fortune and live the stolen life of luxury.

titles.en_jp: Shijou Saikyou no Hen na Yatsu! Saiminjutsushi Jango
titles.en_us: The Weirdest Guy Ever! Jango the Hypnotist!
titles.ja_jp: 史上最強の変な奴!催眠術師ジャンゴ

attributes.canonicalTitle: The Weirdest Guy Ever! Jango the Hypnotist!

attributes.synopsis: Usopp spreads word of Kuro's evil plot and the impending pirate attack, but no one believes his warnings. The Straw Hat Pirates decide to help Usopp put a stop to the dastardly scheme.
attributes.description: Usopp spreads word of Kuro's evil plot and the impending pirate attack, but no one believes his warnings. The Straw Hat Pirates decide to help Usopp put a stop to the dastardly scheme.

titles.en_jp: Inbou wo Abake! Kaizoku Shitsuji Captain Kuro

titles.ja_jp: 陰謀を暴け!海賊執事キャプテンクロ

attributes.canonicalTitle: Expose the Plot! Pirate Butler, Captain Kuro!

attributes.synopsis: Luffy and crew seek to best Captain Kuro, but they've prepared their defense on the wrong side of the island! All looks grim now that Usopp must face off against the Black Cat Pirates alone.
attributes.description: Luffy and crew seek to best Captain Kuro, but they've prepared their defense on the wrong side of the island! All looks grim now that Usopp must face off against the Black Cat Pirates alone.

titles.en_jp: Gekitotsu! Kuroneko Kaizoku-dan Sakamichi no Daikoubou!
titles.en_us: Clash with the Black Cat Pirates! The Great Battle on the Slope!
titles.ja_jp: 激突!クロネコ海賊団坂道の大攻防!

attributes.canonicalTitle: Clash with the Black Cat Pirates! The Great Battle on the Slope!

attributes.synopsis: In an effort to save Usopp's village, the Straw Hat Pirates seek to block the marauders' path from the sea. With Luffy out of the battle, Zoro must face the fearsome Meowban Brothers!
attributes.description: In an effort to save Usopp's village, the Straw Hat Pirates seek to block the marauders' path from the sea. With Luffy out of the battle, Zoro must face the fearsome Meowban Brothers!

titles.en_jp: Kyoufu no Futarigumi! Nyaban Brothers VS Zoro
titles.en_us: The Terrifying Duo! Meowban Brothers vs. Zoro!
titles.ja_jp: 恐怖の二人組!ニャーバン兄弟VSゾロ

attributes.canonicalTitle: The Terrifying Duo! Meowban Brothers vs. Zoro!

attributes.synopsis: Nami manages to rescue Zoro's missing swords and attempts to revive Luffy. With one of the Meowban brothers down, the other rages on even more fiercely than before!
attributes.description: Nami manages to rescue Zoro's missing swords and attempts to revive Luffy. With one of the Meowban brothers down, the other rages on even more fiercely than before!

titles.en_jp: Luffy Fukkatsu! Kaya-ojousama no Kesshi no Teikou
titles.en_us: Luffy Back in Action! Miss Kaya's Desperate Resistance!
titles.ja_jp: ルフィ復活!カヤお嬢様の決死の抵抗

attributes.canonicalTitle: Luffy Back in Action! Miss Kaya's Desperate Resistance!

attributes.synopsis: Usopp's friends run away with the heiress Kaya. Jango races off after them, but not before sending Butchie into a berserk rage. As Zoro continues his battle, Luffy takes on Captain Kuro.
attributes.description: Usopp's friends run away with the heiress Kaya. Jango races off after them, but not before sending Butchie into a berserk rage. As Zoro continues his battle, Luffy takes on Captain Kuro.

titles.en_jp: Kuro wo Taose! Otoko Usopp Namida no Ketsui!
titles.en_us: Beat Kuro! Usopp the Man's Tearful Resolve!
titles.ja_jp: クロを倒せ!男ウソップ涙の決意!

attributes.canonicalTitle: Beat Kuro! Usopp the Man's Tearful Resolve!

attributes.synopsis: Luffy battles with Kuro on the beach, while the Veggies (with Kaya in tow) flee Jango the Hypnotist.
attributes.description: Luffy battles with Kuro on the beach, while the Veggies (with Kaya in tow) flee Jango the Hypnotist.

titles.en_jp: Kayaw wo Mamore! Usopp Kaizoku-dan dai Katsuyaku!
titles.en_us: Protect Kaya! The Usopp Pirates' Great Efforts!
titles.ja_jp: カヤを守れ!ウソップ海賊団大活躍!

attributes.canonicalTitle: Protect Kaya! The Usopp Pirates' Great Efforts!

attributes.synopsis: Kaya rewards the Straw Hat Pirates' efforts to save her with a ship to call their own - the Going Merry!
attributes.description: Kaya rewards the Straw Hat Pirates' efforts to save her with a ship to call their own - the Going Merry!

titles.en_jp: Ikari Bakuhatsu! Kuro vs Luffy Ketchaku no Yukue!
titles.en_us: Angry Explosion! Kuro vs. Luffy! How it Ends!
titles.ja_jp: 怒り爆発!クロVSルフィ決着の行方!

attributes.canonicalTitle: Angry Explosion! Kuro vs. Luffy! How it Ends!

attributes.synopsis: On the legendary Treasure Island, Luffy and crew encounter strange animals and an even stranger man named Gaimon.
attributes.description: On the legendary Treasure Island, Luffy and crew encounter strange animals and an even stranger man named Gaimon.

titles.en_jp: Anta ga Chinju! Gaimon to Kimyou na Nakama
titles.en_us: You're the Weird Creature! Gaimon and His Strange Friends!
titles.ja_jp: あんたが珍獣!ガイモンと奇妙な仲間

attributes.canonicalTitle: You're the Weird Creature! Gaimon and His Strange Friends!

attributes.synopsis: In the past, young Zoro sparred constantly with a girl named Kuina, but he could never claim victory. They vowed that one of them would someday be the world's greatest swordsman - but tragedy intervened.
attributes.description: In the past, young Zoro sparred constantly with a girl named Kuina, but he could never claim victory. They vowed that one of them would someday be the world's greatest swordsman - but tragedy intervened.

titles.en_jp: Santouryuu no Kako! Zoro to Kuina no Chikai!
titles.en_us: The Three-Sword Style's Past! Zoro and Kuina's Vow!
titles.ja_jp: 三刀流の過去!ゾロとくいなの誓い!

attributes.canonicalTitle: The Three-Sword Style's Past! Zoro and Kuina's Vow!

attributes.synopsis: The Straw Hats need a cook among their crew, so they head to a nearby restaurant and meet a passionate Sous Chef named Sanji.
attributes.description: The Straw Hats need a cook among their crew, so they head to a nearby restaurant and meet a passionate Sous Chef named Sanji.

titles.en_jp: Meibutsu Kokku! Kaijou Restaurant no Sanji
titles.en_us: Famous Cook! Sanji of the Sea Restaurant!
titles.ja_jp: 名物コック!海上レストランのサンジ

attributes.canonicalTitle: Famous Cook! Sanji of the Sea Restaurant!

attributes.synopsis: Luffy witnesses the fighting prowess and compassionate nature of the Sous Chef Sanji. The good news: The Going Merry's found a cook! The bad news: He has no intention of joining the crew!
attributes.description: Luffy witnesses the fighting prowess and compassionate nature of the Sous Chef Sanji. The good news: The Going Merry's found a cook! The bad news: He has no intention of joining the crew!

titles.en_jp: Manekarezaru Kyaku! Sanji no Meshi to Gin no On
titles.en_us: Unwelcome Customer! Sanji's Food and Gin's Debt!
titles.ja_jp: 招かれざる客!サンジの飯とギンの恩

attributes.canonicalTitle: Unwelcome Customer! Sanji's Food and Gin's Debt!

attributes.synopsis: The staff and patrons of the Baratie panic when Don Krieg arrives! The starving pirate begs for nourishment, only to find himself denied. Unable to see a wretch starve, Sanji steps in once again.
attributes.description: The staff and patrons of the Baratie panic when Don Krieg arrives! The starving pirate begs for nourishment, only to find himself denied. Unable to see a wretch starve, Sanji steps in once again.

titles.ja_jp: 最強の海賊艦隊!提督ドン·クリーク

attributes.canonicalTitle: The Strongest Pirate Fleet! Commodore Don Krieg!

attributes.synopsis: Don Krieg promises further malice as he returns to his ship, but the threat to the Baratie proves short-lived as an even bigger threat arrives!
attributes.description: Don Krieg promises further malice as he returns to his ship, but the threat to the Baratie proves short-lived as an even bigger threat arrives!

titles.en_jp: Mamore Baratie! Dai Kaizoku: Akaashi no Zeff

attributes.canonicalTitle: Protect Baratie! The Great Pirate, Red Foot Zeff!

attributes.synopsis: The Going Merry's been stolen by Nami, and the showdown for possession of the Baratie is delayed. But the action's not dead in the water - Zoro challenges Hawk-Eye Mihawk to a duel!
attributes.description: The Going Merry's been stolen by Nami, and the showdown for possession of the Baratie is delayed. But the action's not dead in the water - Zoro challenges Hawk-Eye Mihawk to a duel!

titles.en_us: Hawk-Eye Mihawk! The Great Swordsman Zoro Falls At Sea!
titles.ja_jp: 鷹の目のミホーク!剣豪ゾロ海に散る

attributes.canonicalTitle: Hawk-Eye Mihawk! The Great Swordsman Zoro Falls At Sea!

attributes.synopsis: The battle begins for possession of the Baratie, with Zeff leading the cooks against Krieg's pirates. Luffy and crew join the fray, but things aren't looking too good!
attributes.description: The battle begins for possession of the Baratie, with Zeff leading the cooks against Krieg's pirates. Luffy and crew join the fray, but things aren't looking too good!

attributes.canonicalTitle: The Deadly Foot Technique Bursts Forth! Sanji vs. The Invincible Pearl!

attributes.synopsis: Sanji recalls his childhood as an apprentice chef aboard a ship attacked by Red Foot Zeff! When the young Sanji found himself overboard, it was the fearsome captain himself who jumped to the rescue.
attributes.description: Sanji recalls his childhood as an apprentice chef aboard a ship attacked by Red Foot Zeff! When the young Sanji found himself overboard, it was the fearsome captain himself who jumped to the rescue.

titles.en_jp: Zeff to Sanji no Yume Maboroshi no All Blue

titles.ja_jp: ゼフとサンジの夢·幻のオールブルー

attributes.canonicalTitle: Zeff and Sanji's Dream! The Illusory All Blue!

attributes.synopsis: As the battle for Baratie rages on, Luffy is forced to take a drastic course of action and Ghin debates where his loyalties lie.
attributes.description: As the battle for Baratie rages on, Luffy is forced to take a drastic course of action and Ghin debates where his loyalties lie.

titles.en_jp: Reitetsu Hijou no Kijin Kaizoku Kantai Souchou Gin
titles.en_us: Cool-headed, Cold-hearted Demon! Pirate Fleet Chief Commander Gin!
titles.ja_jp: 冷徹非情の鬼人·海賊艦隊総隊長ギン

attributes.canonicalTitle: Cool-headed, Cold-hearted Demon! Pirate Fleet Chief Commander Gin!

attributes.synopsis: The scoundrel Don Krieg appears to have the upper hand in his fight with Luffy. To avoid walking the plank, the rubber man must try a different strategy.
attributes.description: The scoundrel Don Krieg appears to have the upper hand in his fight with Luffy. To avoid walking the plank, the rubber man must try a different strategy.

titles.en_jp: Shinanee yo! Gekitou Luffy vs Krieg!
titles.en_us: I Won't Die! Fierce Battle, Luffy vs. Krieg!
titles.ja_jp: 死なねェよ!激闘ルフィVSクリーク!

attributes.canonicalTitle: I Won't Die! Fierce Battle, Luffy vs. Krieg!

attributes.synopsis: The standoff between Luffy and Don Krieg takes a turn in favor of the Straw Hats when their captain focuses his onslaught on his opponent's weaponry.
attributes.description: The standoff between Luffy and Don Krieg takes a turn in favor of the Straw Hats when their captain focuses his onslaught on his opponent's weaponry.

titles.en_jp: Shitou no Ketchaku! Hara ni Kukutta Ippon no Yari!

titles.ja_jp: 決闘の決着!腹にくくった1本の槍!

attributes.canonicalTitle: The Conclusion of the Deadly Battle! A Spear of Blind Determination!

attributes.synopsis: With Don Krieg defeated, Luffy tries to convince Sanji to join up with the Straw Hats. The skilled cook is interested, but he has something to prove before moving on.
attributes.description: With Don Krieg defeated, Luffy tries to convince Sanji to join up with the Straw Hats. The skilled cook is interested, but he has something to prove before moving on.

titles.en_jp: Tabidachi! Umi no Kokku wa Luffy to Tomo Ni

titles.ja_jp: 旅立ち!海のコックはルフィとともに

attributes.canonicalTitle: Set Sail! The Seafaring Cook Sets off With Luffy!

attributes.synopsis: With their culinary concerns in good hands, the Straw Hats set off in search of Nami - who's on a collision course with a deadly foe!
attributes.description: With their culinary concerns in good hands, the Straw Hats set off in search of Nami - who's on a collision course with a deadly foe!

titles.en_jp: Higashi no Umi Saiaku no Otoko! Gyojin Kaizoku Arlong!
titles.en_us: The Worst Man in the Eastern Seas! Fishman Pirate Arlong!
titles.ja_jp: 東の海最悪の男!魚人海賊アーロン!

attributes.canonicalTitle: The Worst Man in the Eastern Seas! Fishman Pirate Arlong!

attributes.synopsis: Zoro is captured by Fishman Arlong and learns a shocking secret about Nami. Unable to believe his ears, he puts the navigator to the ultimate test.
attributes.description: Zoro is captured by Fishman Arlong and learns a shocking secret about Nami. Unable to believe his ears, he puts the navigator to the ultimate test.

titles.en_jp: Kokoyashi Mura no Majo! Arlong no Onna Kanbu
titles.en_us: Witch of Cocoyashi Village! Arlong's Female Leader!
titles.ja_jp: ココヤシ村の魔女!アーロンの女幹部

attributes.canonicalTitle: Witch of Cocoyashi Village! Arlong's Female Leader!

attributes.synopsis: Luffy and his crew make their way towards Arlong Park and a showdown with its fishy proprietor. Along the way, they discover a treasure map that raises more questions about Nami.
attributes.description: Luffy and his crew make their way towards Arlong Park and a showdown with its fishy proprietor. Along the way, they discover a treasure map that raises more questions about Nami.

titles.en_jp: Usopp Shisu? Luffy Jouriku wa Mada?
titles.en_us: Usopp Dead?! When is Luffy Going to Make Landfall?!
titles.ja_jp: ウソップ死す!?ルフィ上陸はまだ?

attributes.canonicalTitle: Usopp Dead?! When is Luffy Going to Make Landfall?!

attributes.synopsis: A fierce argument over where Nami's loyalties lie divides the Straw Hat Pirates and only one thing's for sure - no one is willing to risk their life for a traitor.
attributes.description: A fierce argument over where Nami's loyalties lie divides the Straw Hat Pirates and only one thing's for sure - no one is willing to risk their life for a traitor.

titles.en_jp: Zenin Shuuketsu! Usopp ga Kataru Nami no Shinjitsu
titles.en_us: Everyone's Gathered! Usopp Speaks the Truth About Nami!
titles.ja_jp: 全員集結!ウソップが語るナミの真実

attributes.canonicalTitle: Everyone's Gathered! Usopp Speaks the Truth About Nami!

attributes.synopsis: Nami's adopted sister, Nojiko arrives to fill in some details about the skilled mapmaker's younger days.
attributes.description: Nami's adopted sister, Nojiko arrives to fill in some details about the skilled mapmaker's younger days.

titles.en_jp: Himerareta Kako! Onna Senshi Bellemere!
titles.en_us: Untold Past! Female Warrior Bellemere!
titles.ja_jp: 秘められた過去!女戦士ベルメール!

attributes.canonicalTitle: Untold Past! Female Warrior Bellemere!

attributes.description: Nojiko continues the story of Nami's younger days. Back in the present, Nami gets agonizingly close to a long time goal, but betrayal looms on the horizon.

titles.en_jp: Ikinuke! Haha Bellemere to Nami no Kizuna!
titles.en_us: Survive! Mother Bellemere and Nami's Bond!
titles.ja_jp: 生き抜け!母ベルメールとナミの絆!

attributes.canonicalTitle: Survive! Mother Bellemere and Nami's Bond!

attributes.description: Nezumi comes to confiscate Nami's treasure, but who's he working for? More importantly, who's Nami working for, and what's she gonna do with her booty?

titles.en_jp: Luffy Tatsu! Uragirareta Yakusoku no Ketsumatsu!

titles.ja_jp: ルフィ立つ!裏切られた約束の結末

attributes.description: The Straw Hats' faith in Nami is restored, and now it's time for a battle royal! Luffy and the gang are determined to make Arlong pay for mistreating their friend.

titles.en_jp: Luffy Dai Pinchi! Gyojin vs Luffy Kaizoku-dan

titles.ja_jp: ルフィ大ピンチ!魚人VSルフィ海賊団

attributes.description: The Straw Hats and Arlong's fishmen are locked in a swashbuckling slugfest, but things take a bad turn when Luffy gets trapped beneath the waves.

titles.en_jp: Luffy Suibotsu! Zoro vs Tako no Hatchan

attributes.synopsis: While his friends work to free the captain of the Straw Hats, cowardly Usopp finds himself in a position to shed his yellow streak and make his father proud.
attributes.description: While his friends work to free the captain of the Straw Hats, cowardly Usopp finds himself in a position to shed his yellow streak and make his father proud.

titles.en_jp: Hokori Takaki Senshi! Gekitou Sanji to Usopp

attributes.description: Nami must decide between letting Arlong maintain his hold over her, or joining the Straw Hats and leading the oppressed villagers against the tyrant fishman.

titles.en_jp: Luffy Zenkai! Nami no Ketsui to Mugiwara Boushi

attributes.synopsis:
The much-anticipated wedding cake is on its way, but there is a debate at the last minute! Shouldn't this opportunity be used to slip poison into Big Mom's meal to topple the Emperor of the Sea? Meanwhile, Carrot's unearthly ability based on the power of the moon saves the day!

(Source: Crunchyroll)
attributes.description:
The much-anticipated wedding cake is on its way, but there is a debate at the last minute! Shouldn't this opportunity be used to slip poison into Big Mom's meal to topple the Emperor of the Sea? Meanwhile, Carrot's unearthly ability based on the power of the moon saves the day!

(Source: Crunchyroll)

attributes.synopsis:
Luffy, through sheer force of will, can almost use his Haki to battle Katakuri! Meanwhile, the Sunny catches fire while the Straw Hats try to kick out Big Mom but that’s when Jimbei steps up to the plate and takes a swing at her!

(Source: Crunchyroll)

attributes.synopsis:
Luffy tries to enhance his Haki to foresee Katakuri’s next move but Katakuri’s attacks keep pulling him down! However, when he summons every bit of wisdom from his training with Rayleigh, he remembers something important that could turn the tables for him! 

(Source: Crunchyroll)

attributes.synopsis:
The cake is finally prepared and brought before Big Mom! With the end of her vicious rampage in sight, there is a chance for the Straw Hats to flee! Big Mom's crew is forced to decide who to attack! Meanwhile, Luffy grows ever closer to using his Haki! 

(Source: Crunchyroll)

attributes.synopsis:
Hiding her presence, Flampe shoots her blowgun at Luffy to support her dear brother Katakuri. Meanwhile, Oven launches a dastardly plan to fence Luffy in - by destroying every mirror on the island! And Smoothie is on the tail of the Sunny as it makes its way towards Cacao Island!
(Source Cruncyroll)

(Source Cruncyroll)
